questionHtml:
Which compound produces the following 1H NMR spectrum?


SDBS, National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (AIST).


A.  Propane

B.  Propanone

C.  Propanal

D.  2,2-dimethylpropane

meta.title: Which compound produces the following 1H NMR spectrum? SDBS, National Institute of Advanced Industrial Science and Technology (AIST). A. Propane B. Propanone C. Propanal D. 2,2-dim
